entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub H1 2024 Release Insights
entry.content:
SAP SuccessFactors continues to set the bar high with its first half of 2024 release, particularly in the Talent Intelligence Hub and Succession & Development. This release packs exciting new features and essential updates that will transform how organisations manage and develop their workforce. Here’s an integrated overview of what’s new and noteworthy, with my insights and view

AI-Assisted Skills Architecture Creation: A Game Changer

The new AI-assisted skills architecture creation tool is a standout feature that addresses a significant challenge many organizations face: starting a skill library from scratch. This tool leverages AI to analyse job role data and automatically suggests a relevant skills library, making it easier for organizations to initiate their journey with the Talent Intelligence Hub.

Key Points:
- Automated Skill Mapping: The tool focuses on job role description fields to determine necessary skills, streamlining the process of building a comprehensive skills library.
- AI Unit Requirement: Access to this feature requires licensed AI units, ensuring that only premium users benefit from this advanced capability.
- Industry-Specific Insights: Initially supporting a range of industries like software, manufacturing, and general business, SAP plans to expand its coverage, enhancing the tool's relevance across more sectors.

NextGen Career Development: Integrated and Intuitive

The integration of the Growth Portfolio with Career Development and the Opportunity Marketplace is a significant enhancement. It brings a holistic view of career opportunities directly within the Growth Portfolio, enabling users to see targeted roles, understand skill gaps, and access role-readiness assessments seamlessly.

Enhancements Include:
- Role and Opportunity Insights: Direct integration allows users to view role-specific insights and growth opportunities without navigating away from their current workflow.
- Opportunity Marketplace Integration: Users with access to the Opportunity Marketplace will see tailored recommendations, further personalizing their development experience.

In one of the sessions last year at SuccessConnect, the SAP Product managers mentioned that a user shouldn't need to go to a module to access information. Any SF module should present the right information to the user in the screen that they are in - this seems to bring that to life!

 

Streamlining Upgrades with New Tools

Upgrading from Centre of Capabilities to Growth Portfolio still remains a challenging process for many. The latest release introduces new tools and functionalities to ease this transition:
- Check Tool Updates: New tools address common upgrade issues, such as invalid skills and competencies and job family mismatches in the Job Description Manager, offering quick fixes to streamline the upgrade process.
- Enhanced Reporting Capabilities: This release also expands the reporting functionalities, allowing users to export competencies and skills from the Talent Intelligence Hub for enhanced data analysis and decision-making.

Report Stories

With this release, you can now export the Competencies and Skills available for reporting in conjunction with Job Profile Builder data, so we can report on all skills and
competencies mapped to specific roles

The 1H 2024 release of SAP SuccessFactors marks a significant step forward towards management of talent, leveraging advanced AI technologies and integration to enhance user experience and organizational efficiency. These tools will help organizations with a speedier path to a skills based organizations. As SAP continues to evolve, these enhancements are set to offer organizations the tools they need to thrive in an increasingly competitive business landscape.

entry.title: Getting down to business with AI: Step-by-step video tutorials
entry.content:
AI is revolutionizing businesses by transforming the way they operate, make decisions, and interact with customers. With its ability to analyze vast amounts of data, AI enables you to gain valuable insights and make more informed decisions by automate repetitive tasks, improving efficiency, and upleveling productivity. Generative AI, specifically, enables completely new capabilities in business software, such as creating new content, summarizing complex information, writing computer code, reasoning through problems, and more.  

Did you know that AI already exists in most of your SAP solutions? AI is already a central, integrated capability of our enterprise applications and business technology, used by tens of thousands of our cloud customers.

Learn how to activate and configure AI capabilities across your business with step-by-step video tutorials.

Source, Engage, and Hire the Right Talent with Agility

By shifting the focus from job titles and degrees to a comprehensive understanding of employees’ skills, businesses can have a more accurate and efficient evaluation of talent across all levels. With the AI-assisted interview question generation and job description enhancement functionalities in SAP SuccessFactors solutions, recruiters can now generate an enhanced job description and interview questions using the power of generative AI. In this episode of Getting Down to Business with AI, we'll take you through enabling the AI-assisted Content Generator in SAP SuccessFactors, configuring the job requisition fields, setting up the integration between SAP SuccessFactors and Microsoft 365, and enabling the interview alerts and assessment in Microsoft Teams

Watch the video >

Quickly Resolve Finance Issues Before Payments

Adding intelligent technology to the auditing process allows your team to review expenses more efficiently and reimburse employees faster. With greater visibility into spending, auditors can also hold employees accountable and resolve spending discrepancies before they become problems. SAP Concur solutions use AI to enhance and automate processes, give auditors more visibility into spending, and protect your company’s bottom line. In this episode of Getting Down to Business with AI, we’ll take you through the configuration of AI in Verify, SAP Concur’s intelligent technology solution that streamlines processes, provides visibility into spending, and helps auditors to be more agile. Verify uses AI to analyze each item in expense reports and performs a series of checks for receipt and policy violations.

Watch the video >

Optimize Customer Relevance and Business Impact

Intelligent selling service is a technology-driven approach to sales that leverages AI to automate and optimize sales processes. It improves product discovery and increases brand engagement, drives conversion rates and raises average order value, and increases customer satisfaction and loyalty. The AI-based Intelligent Selling Services for the SAP Commerce Cloud solution captures and analyzes behavioral data in real-time across each customer’s commerce journey to create individualized customer experiences, which are optimized for both customer relevance and business impact. In this episode of Getting Down to Business with AI, we'll take you through the configuration of AI-based selling services, how to validate the foundation and merchandising modules, introduce tracking to the storefront, define product mix and strategy, and insert the strategy in the shop page templates.

Watch the video >

Tailor Recommendations, Save Costs, and Maintain Compliance with Guided Buying

Giving employees a personalized, guided experience when making purchases on the job allows users to save their company costs, stay compliant with organizational policies, and expedite the entire procurement process. In this episode of Getting Down to Business with AI, we’ll walk through the configuration of the AI capabilities within SAP Ariba Guided Buying AI, where you can deliver item recommendations that are tailored, cost effective, and compliant. You’ll learn about setting up and managing parameters, and quantity requirements for recommendations and usage reports.

Watch the video >

Increasing Productivity and Product Quality

Today’s manufacturing companies are not only looking to improve their overall first-pass yields and quality, but to also support continuous improvement programs that exist at the manufacturing-level. It’s not just about correcting things in line with the process, but how can larger corrective actions and workflows be applied around this process. AI-based Visual Inspection in SAP Digital Manufacturing is a feature that every manufacturing company is looking for. In this episode of Getting Down to Business with AI, we’ll take you through the configuration of Visual Inspection, the AI-based solution that defect detection to increase productivity on the shop floor, ensures product quality, and provides immediate added value for manufacturing companies.

Watch the video >

Gain Confidence, Speed, and Agility with Intelligent Product Recommendations

Manufacturers of complex configurable products often rely on the expertise of sales personnel to recommend the suitable product offering to their customers. This approach can be difficult to scale and result in a subpar buying experience for customers. In this episode of Getting Down to Business with AI, we’ll walk you through setting up the AI capabilities in SAP Industry Cloud with Intelligent Product Recommendations. You can recommend the optimal product (configurable or standard) and default configuration along with commercial attributes, such as lead time and price.

 
 
Watch the video >
 
SAP gives customers AI capabilities embedded into SAP applications, empowering their business processes with AI that's as intuitive as it is flexible and powerful. Our Business AI capabilities enable smarter decisions and efficiencies at scale, while our unwavering commitment to responsibility ensures trust and compliance in every interaction.

Interested in learning more?

  • Learn more about SAP Business AI
  • Meet Joule, SAP’s AI copilot
  • What is generative AI?

entry.title: Elevate Your Business with AI at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!
entry.content:
Unleash the Power of Business AI

In an era where digital transformation is reshaping industries, Business AI stands at the forefront of innovation, driving efficiency, enhancing customer experiences, and unlocking new possibilities for businesses worldwide. SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3-5, 2024, offers a unique opportunity to explore the transformative potential of Business AI and connect with leading experts in the field.

Spotlight on Business AI: Don't Miss These Must-Attend Sessions!

  • Session 1: Translating Generative AI and LLMs into Business Benefits (SER207)
    Unlock the future of our customer support offerings by exploring how generative AI and large language models (LLMs) help engineers support customers with outstanding speed. Delve into the design, implementation, and integration of LLMs for enhanced internal efficiencies. Elevate your support capabilities for an accelerated customer experience.

  • Session 2: AI in Customer Support: SAP's Path to Excellence (ASUG307)
    Discover SAP's approach to support excellence by infusing AI into customer support, enhancing efficiency, and user satisfaction. Gain insights into actionable tactics for seamless AI integration and effective measurement of its business outcomes. Explore SAP's blueprint for top-tier AI-driven customer support.

  • Session 3: SAP runs SAP: Leading the AI Revolution in Customer Support (SER242)
    Experience our AI-driven customer support paradigm. Uncover strategies for AI fusion, elevating support efficacy, and customer satisfaction. Witness our journey, which sets benchmarks for AI-powered customer service excellence. Use this blueprint to smoothly integrate AI into your company, unlocking success through the SAP for Me portal.

  • Session 4: Reinventing Support with AI (SER202+SER247)
    Learn how our support offerings use intelligent automation and AI to elevate your customer experience. Gain insights into bi-directional support and witness our transformative journey toward delivering outstanding value. Step into the future of predictive, bi-directional support and maximize your support experience.

Experience Business AI in Action at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!

Visit our demo station within the Services and Support Center on the show floor to see Business AI in action! Experience live demonstrations showcasing the power of AI in customer support, elevating efficiency, and user satisfaction. Uncover actionable strategies for effortlessly integrating AI into your operations and measuring its impact on business outcomes.

Exclusive Opportunity for 1:1 Meetings with Business AI Experts!

Don't miss the chance to engage directly with our Business AI experts during SAP Sapphire 2024! We're offering limited opportunities for 1:1 meetings at the Services and Support Center on the show floor in Orlando.

Limited Availability!
Take advantage of this unique opportunity to discuss your specific challenges and explore tailored solutions with our experts. Secure your 1:1 appointment now before slots fill up!

Request your meeting here: 👉I want to talk Business AI at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando

Get Ready to Elevate Your Business AI Strategy!

Join us at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando to discover the power of Business AI and how it can transform your business operations. Engage with industry leaders, attend insightful sessions, and take the first step towards building a future-ready, efficient, and resilient business.

We look forward to seeing you there!

Feel free to share this article to promote the Business AI sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando and encourage your network to arrange 1:1 meetings with our experts!

entry.title: It's never been easier to invoke Machine Learning and Generative AI from an ABAP application
entry.content:
We have exciting news for SAP developers! You may remember that last year, IBM and SAP jointly announced  a milestone collaboration around embedding AI into SAP solutions. One visible outcome was the adoption of Watson technology in the SAP Start and SAP Joule digital assistants.

And at the same time, IBM's been working on creating a watsonx Software Development toolKit (SDK) for SAP ABAP, complementing the existing Watson SDK that was refreshed in 2023.

I am pleased to confirm that the watsonx ABAP SDK version 1.0.0 is now live. It was released late March 2024 by the IBM SAP Software Engineering Team as expected. It is a separate release from its relative, the Watson SDK, who released a version 2 in Q4 2023. Both SDKs are open source and downloadable from GitHub.

If you develop SAP apps or have clients doing so, this is big news. It is truly a revolution in easily integrating Machine Learning and Generative AI, in just a few clicks, into an SAP ABAP application. Literally in 10 minutes!

The watsonx SDK comes in two flavors, allowing SAP developers to easily access watsonx from an ABAP application in a traditional SAP NetWeaver environment, and also in the latest SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP):

  • watsonx ABAP SDK for SAP NetWeaver 
  • watsonx ABAP SDK for SAP BTP ABAP Environment 

The SDK natively supports both the watsonx.ai (V1) and the Watson Machine Learning (V4). To get developers up to speed quickly, comprehensive examples are included in both of the APIs' documentation.

  • The sample code for the watsonx.ai sends a AI prompt to a generative AI model and collects the generated response. It uses the granite-13b-chat-v2 in the example but there are many other superb models available through watsonx.
  • The sample code for the Watson Machine Learning API lets you unleash the full capability of Watson Machine Learning (ML):
    • Without going too far in the detail, to use watsonx ML you have to create a watsonx deployment space. This is where you will deploy your ML assets, which can be models, functions, or scripts.
    • Python is a popular language for functions, in fact most frameworks in Watson ML rely on Python (or R). With a Python function, you can perform any ML task like creating, training, and using models.
      • For instance you can recognize hand-written digits, or to predict business area for a car rental company, etc.
      • You're welcome to write your own Python functions from scratch but in most cases you'd want to leverage existing example notebooks to save time
    • Going back to the watsonx ABAP SDK: in the supplied sample code, the ABAP application deploys arbitrary Python code as a Python function on a watsonx deployment space and calls the deployed function. It also supplies a CURL command that can be used to easily call the deployed function from the command line
    • So the SDK connects lets you use the full capabilities of watsonx ML with very little development effort.  Then no further SAP programming knowledge is necessary, you can refer to the regular watsonx ML documentation. And of course, reuse the many examples of functions, models, and scripts provided by IBM and third parties.

See also the post by @christian_bartels on the same topic.

entry.title: How to create LLM based Chatbot for SAP HANA Cloud using RAG Application
entry.content:
What is a RAG application?

RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) is like giving a super-smart robot access to a huge library of books (In our example it is SAP HANA Vector Engine) so it can find the right answers when you ask it questions. It works by blending two methods: one where the robot searches for information, and another where it generates answers. This way, the robot can understand your questions better and give you more accurate responses. It's like having a really knowledgeable friend who always has the perfect answer to your questions because they know where to look for information.

Objective

To create a quick and easy RAG application that can query SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine using LLM and reply back as professional salesman. Below are the summary of tasks:

  1. Create a table with a vector column, load the table with data
  2. Call LLM with prompt and get an answer based on query
  3. Fun with prompt engineering and the LLM chatbot!

Tools and Infrastructure needed

Since this is meant to be quick and easy, I would recommend below tools:

SAP HANA Cloud

This is available in SAP BTP Trial account here. Create an instance of SAP HANA Cloud - use Set Up SAP HANA Cloud Administration Tools - Boosters to speed up the setup process. Once the instance is up and running, change the configuration to allow all IP addresses to your instance at SAP HANA Cloud Central -> All Instances -> Click on HANA Cloud Instance -> Manage Configuration -> Connections Tab -> Make sure Allow all IP addresses is selected. This step will allow to reach SAP HANA Cloud from a client or another tool like a python notebook. 

Visual Studio Code with Jyupter notebook extension

Download VS Code from here and Jupyter extension from here. Make sure latest version of python is installed.

Dataset from Kaggle

Download Amazon products CSV file from here.

API Key from OpenAI

Create an API key from here.

Exercise

Open SAP HANA Database Explorer and execute below query to create a table - PRODUCTS.

 

CREATE COLUMN TABLE "DBADMIN"."PRODUCTS"(
	"ASIN" NVARCHAR(50),
	"TITLE" NVARCHAR(1000),
	"IMGURL" NVARCHAR(500),
	"PRODUCTURL" NVARCHAR(500),
	"STARS" DECIMAL(3, 2),
	"REVIEWS" INTEGER,
	"PRICE" DECIMAL(10, 2),
	"LISTPRICE" DECIMAL(10, 2),
	"CATEGORY_ID" INTEGER,
	"ISBESTSELLER" BOOLEAN,
	"BOUGHTINLASTMONTH" INTEGER,
	PRIMARY KEY(
		"ASIN"
	)
)
UNLOAD PRIORITY 5 AUTO MERGE;

 

Right click on the table name and choose Import data from context menu. In the wizard like screen, provide the Amazon Products CSV file downloaded from Kaggle and upload the records to the table.

Execute below SQL to add two new columns - VECTOR_STR and VECTOR to the PRODUCTS table:

 

ALTER TABLE products
ADD (vector_str NCLOB,
     vector real_vector);

 

The setup of our datasource is now complete. Next step is to add text embeddings to one of the new columns - VECTOR_STR. These text embeddings are vector representations of the data - in this case it is the TITLE column. These text embeddings are created with the help of trained model, some choices are as below:

  • GPT-3 (text-embedding-ada-002)
  • MPNET (all-mpnet-base-v2)
  • Word2Vec (word2vec-google-news-300)
  • Glove (en_core_web_lg)

While all of them are great for general usage, since this tutorial is based on OpenAI hence GPT-3 is chosen as the embedding model. To add text embeddings, execute below python code:

 

%pip install hana_ml
from hana_ml import ConnectionContext

cc= ConnectionContext(
    address='<tenant-name>.hana.trial-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com',
    port='443',
    user='DBADMIN',
    password='*****',
    encrypt=True
    )
print(cc.hana_version())
print(cc.get_current_schema())

import requests # type: ignore
import json
def get_text_embedding(text):
  url = "https://api.openai.com/v1/embeddings"
  headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Authorization": "Bearer {}".format("***OpenAI Token here***")
  }
  data = {
    "input": text,
    "model": "text-embedding-3-small"
  }
  response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, data=json.dumps(data))
  if response.status_code == 200:
    return response.json()["data"][0]["embedding"]
  else:
    raise Exception("Error:", response.status_code, response.text)

def process_row(row):
    # Perform operations on each row
    # Uncomment below to see how embeddings look like - this will slow down the proecessing since it will print the vectors for each and every row
    #print(row['CATEGORY_NAME'],get_text_embedding(row['TITLE']))
    cursor1 = cc.connection.cursor()
    sql1 = """UPDATE PRODUCTS SET VECTOR_STR = '{}' WHERE asin = '{}'""".format(get_text_embedding(row['TITLE']),row['ASIN'])

    cursor1.execute(sql1)

cursor = cc.connection.cursor()
sql = '''SELECT * FROM PRODUCTS LIMIT 5000;'''
cursor.execute(sql)
hdf = cc.sql(sql)
df_context = hdf.head(5000).collect()
df_context.apply(process_row, axis=1)
#print(df_context)
cursor.close()

 

Visit this github link to download the Jupyter notebook for detailed explanations.

Now execute below SQL to convert all vectors into real vectors and populate the VECTOR column. This step will enable SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine to execute similarity searches.

 

UPDATE PRODUCTS SET VECTOR = TO_REAL_VECTOR(VECTOR_STR);

 

Define below functions in python:

Function to perform vector search accepting parameters - query as string, metric can be either COSINE_SIMILARITY or L2DISTANCE and k is number of records:

 

def run_vector_search(query: str, metric="COSINE_SIMILARITY", k=4):
    if metric == 'L2DISTANCE':
        sort = 'ASC'
    else:
        sort = 'DESC'
    query_vector = get_text_embedding(query)
    sql = '''SELECT TOP {k} "ASIN", "TITLE" 
        FROM "PRODUCTS"
        ORDER BY "{metric}"("VECTOR", TO_REAL_VECTOR('{qv}')) {sort}'''.format(k=k, metric=metric, qv=query_vector, sort=sort)
    hdf = cc.sql(sql)
    df_context = hdf.head(k).collect()
    return df_context

 

Function llm_query that will perform ask LLM chatbot and perform human like conversations - not quite ready for a real conversation but the answer will be very well articulated:

 

def llm_query(query: str):
    from langchain_core.output_parsers import StrOutputParser # type: ignore
    from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate # type: ignore
    
    # Toggle and uncomment below prompt templates to execute use cases for with and without role
    
    # Use Case 1 - without LLM role assignment
    #promptTemplate = ChatPromptTemplate.from_template('''Context:{context} Question:{query}''')
    
    # Use Case 2 - with LLM role assignment as salesman
    promptTemplate = ChatPromptTemplate.from_template('''You are a salesman who promotes and sells online products. When pitching for the product, clearly mention the brand names, 
                                            it's multiple uses, benefits and cost - include a 10% discount if buying today. Use the following pieces of context to answer 
                                            the question at the end. Context:{context} Question:{query}''')
    df_vectorcontext = run_vector_search(query)
    context =  ' '.join(df_vectorcontext['TITLE'].astype('string'))
    #print(context)
    prompt = promptTemplate.format(query=query, context=context)
    response = model.invoke(prompt).content
    return (response)

 

Let us define below function such that it will take a query and print responses both from similarity search and LLM answer:

 

import textwrap
iWidth = 80
def print_responses(query: str):
    print("Results of query '" + query + "' for vector search:\n")
    df = run_vector_search(query=query)
    print(df.head())
    print("\nResults of query '" + query + "' from LLM:\n")
    print(llm_query(query=query))

 

Now let us test a few queries to compare the vector engine similarity search results versus LLM based conversation results.

Use Case 1

Uncomment below line and comment out the other prompt template that gives the salesman role to LLM:

 

promptTemplate = ChatPromptTemplate.from_template('''Context:{context} Question:{query}''')

 

Check below responses for each of the queries:

 

#Query 1 - plain keyword search
print_responses(query="electronics")
Results of query 'electronics' for vector search:

         ASIN                                              TITLE
0  B09V3DH4G9  DC 12V Electronic DC Buzzer 5v Alarm Active Pi...
1  B08G518BHN  DC 3-24V Active Piezo Buzzer 85 db with Indust...
2  B01MYPZZ19  IQ Toys-AB A+B Test Mind Game Brain Teaser Wir...
3  B0C7CNKGTT  cssopenss 6 Pieces Pocket Screwdriver Mini Top...

Results of query 'electronics' from LLM:

Which product is a mind game?

 

 

#Query 2 - phrase search
print_responses(query="electronics entertainment devices")
Results of query 'electronics entertainment devices' for vector search:

         ASIN                                              TITLE
0  B09V3DH4G9  DC 12V Electronic DC Buzzer 5v Alarm Active Pi...
1  B0057PLN9K  New Remote Control VR15-0980-0306-0302 Fit for...
2  B091699Z3W  Kasa Smart Plug Ultra Mini 15A, Smart Home Wi-...
3  B01BGUX78E  Ceptics 2 USB Israel Travel Adapter 4 in 1 Pow...

Results of query 'electronics entertainment devices' from LLM:

1. Kasa Smart Plug Ultra Mini 15A, Smart Home Wi-Fi Outlet Works with Alexa, Google Home & IFTTT: This device allows you to control your home's electronics from anywhere using your smartphone, making your home smarter and more efficient. 

2. New Remote Control VR15-0980-0306-0302 Fit for VIZIO LCD LED TV: This is a replacement remote control for VIZIO LCD LED TVs, which helps you to control your television from a distance effortlessly.

3. Ceptics 2 USB Israel Travel Adapter 4 in 1 Power Plug (Type H) - Universal Socket: This device allows you to charge your electronics while traveling internationally, particularly to Israel. This multi-device charger is compatible with most devices, making it a handy travel accessory. 

4. DC 12V Electronic DC Buzzer 5v Alarm Active Piezo Beep Sound ABS Housing 85dB Wired Connector Black 26Pcs: This device is an electronic buzzer that produces a loud beep sound when activated. It can be used in a variety of applications, including alarms, timers, and notifications.
#Query 3 - Popularity search
print_responses(query="What are top 10 electronics entertainment devices?")
Results of query 'What are top 10 electronics entertainment devices?' for vector search:

         ASIN                                              TITLE
0  B08798HG7F  Stylus Pens for Touch Screens, StylusHome 10 P...
1  B0BQD2TZSL                  Men's Top Ten Hi Basketball Shoes
2  B07C87CX9T  10 Plagues Passover Finger Puppets Vinyl Gift ...
3  B07L5RVRR2  T Shirt Boys Creeper Inside Black Short Sleeve...

Results of query 'What are top 10 electronics entertainment devices?' from LLM:

As an AI, I don't have real-time data, but as per common trends and popularity, the top 10 electronics entertainment devices might be:

1. Apple iPad Pro
2. Samsung Galaxy Tablet
3. Microsoft Xbox Series X
4. Sony PlayStation 5
5. Amazon Kindle Paperwhite
6. Apple iPhone 13 Pro
7. Samsung Galaxy S21
8. Apple AirPods Pro
9. Nintendo Switch
10. Oculus Quest 2 VR Headset. 

Please note that the list can vary based on personal preferences and the specific types of entertainment someone is interested in.
#Query 4 - Question that needs semantic knowledge
print_responses(query="Which items do you recommend for my dental needs?")
Results of query 'Which items do you recommend for my dental needs?' for vector search:

         ASIN                                              TITLE
0  B07PNPSZ18  Easyinsmile Dental Tofflemire Matrices Bands S...
1  B0BX9KQWDK  315 Count Floss Threaders for Braces, Dental F...
2  B07NPBY16M  RADIUS Toothbrush Source Floss Brush BPA Free ...
3  B00JVF4UZ6  Tenders Pre-Toothbrush, 12 Individually Packag...

Results of query 'Which items do you recommend for my dental needs?' from LLM:

AI: As an AI, I don't have personal experiences, but I can provide information based on general dental care. All the items you mentioned could be beneficial depending on your specific dental needs. 

1. Easyinsmile Dental Tofflemire Matrices Bands: These are typically used by dentists for restorative procedures. Unless you're a dental professional, you probably won't need these.

2. 315 Count Floss Threaders for Braces, Bridges, and Implants: If you have braces, bridges, or implants, floss threaders can be extremely helpful in maintaining your oral hygiene.

3. RADIUS Toothbrush Source Floss Brush: This appears to be a high-quality, eco-friendly toothbrush. Regular brushing is crucial for everyone's oral health.

4. Tenders Pre-Toothbrush: This product seems to be designed for babies who are teething or for individuals who have difficulty using a regular toothbrush. 

Without knowing your specific dental needs, it's hard to make a specific recommendation. However, generally, a good toothbrush and floss (or floss threaders if needed) are essential for everyone's dental hygiene routine. You should consult with your dentist for personalized advice.

 

Use Case 2

Uncomment below line and comment out the other prompt template that has only context and query:

 

promptTemplate = ChatPromptTemplate.from_template('''You are a salesman who promotes and sells online products. When pitching for the product, clearly mention the brand names, 
                                            it's multiple uses, benefits and cost - include a 10% discount if buying today. Use the following pieces of context to answer 
                                            the question at the end. Context:{context} Question:{query}''')

 

Since only LLM prompt template has been modified, let us focus on output from LLM conversation for the four queries:

Query = "electronics"

 

Salesman: Ladies and Gentlemen, I bring you a collection of high-quality, versatile electronic products that will cater to all your needs. First, let's talk about the DC 12V Electronic DC Buzzer. This fantastic device, housed in durable ABS, emits a clear 85dB beep sound, perfect for alarms or alert systems. Wired and ready to connect, it's available in a pack of 26 for just $50. Purchase today, and you'll receive a 10% discount, making it only $45.

For those in the industrial sector, the DC 3-24V Active Piezo Buzzer is a must-have. With 85 dB of industrial audio inside and 2-wire leads, it serves as an efficient electric alarmer. You can get a pack of 10 for just $30, and with our special 10% off today, it's only $27!

Boost your brainpower with the IQ Toys-AB A+B Test Mind Game. This brain teaser wire magic trick toy IQ puzzle set is an excellent investment in your mental agility. Available in a pack of 16, this metallic set is only $20, but with today's discount, it's a steal at $18.

Last but not least, we have the cssopenss Pocket Screwdriver Mini Tops. These magnetic pocket screwdrivers come with a single blade head, perfect for mechanical or electrician work. In a striking green color and available in a pack of 6, these are priced at just $15. But with our exclusive 10% discount today, you can grab them for only $13.50.

Invest in these quality products and experience the benefits for yourself. Remember, the 10% discount is valid only for today. So, hurry up and grab these deals while they last!

 

Query = "electronics entertainment devices"

 

Salesman: Greetings! I have some exciting products in the electronics and entertainment devices sector that I'm sure you'll find interesting. 

Firstly, we have the DC 12V Electronic DC Buzzer. This high-quality buzzer comes with a 5v active piezo beep sound, ABS housing, and an 85dB wired connector. Its versatility means it can be used in various applications, such as alarms, timers, or even as a fun DIY electronic project component. Each pack containing 26 pieces costs just $20, and if you purchase it today, you can avail a 10% discount!

Next, we have the Remote Control VR15-0980-0306-0302, designed especially for VIZIO LCD LED TVs. This top-notch remote control is not only new but perfectly fits with various VIZIO TV models, making your TV viewing experience more convenient and enjoyable. It's available for only $15, and don't forget the 10% discount if you buy today!

Thirdly, we have the amazing Kasa Smart Plug Ultra Mini 15A. This smart home Wi-Fi outlet works with Alexa, Google Home & IFTTT without requiring any hub. It's UL certified and works with 2.4G WiFi only, thus ensuring your home automation is easy and secure. Priced at $10 for a 1-pack, this is a steal, especially with the 10% off today!

Lastly, we have the Ceptics 2 USB Israel Travel Adapter 4 in 1 Power Plug (Type H). This universal socket is perfect for your travel needs, allowing you to charge multiple devices simultaneously, no matter where you are. For just $25, and with a 10% discount if you buy today, this is an absolute necessity for every traveler.

Don't miss out on these fantastic deals. Secure your products today and enjoy the discounts!

 

Query = "What are top 10 electronics entertainment devices?"

 

Salesman: Ladies and Gentlemen, I am here to introduce you to a number of fantastic products that will cater to your electronic and entertainment needs today. 

Firstly, let me present the StylusHome 10 Pack Mesh Fiber Tip Stylus Pens. These are ideal for touch screen devices, suitable for iPad, iPhone, Samsung tablets, and all precision capacitive universal touch screen devices. They provide precise control for selecting icons, writing, drawing and gaming. You can own this pack of 10 pens today for a discounted price of $27, a full 10% off from its usual price of $30. 

Next, we have the men's Top Ten Hi Basketball Shoes. These shoes are renowned for their excellent grip, comfort and durability, making them perfect for both casual wear and intense basketball games. They are available today for just $90, a 10% discount from the regular price of $100. 

Lastly, I'd like to introduce you to our 10 Plagues Passover Finger Puppets Vinyl Gift Box Set. This set is perfect for Passover celebrations, offering hours of fun for kids and adults alike. The set includes 10 puppets each representing one of the Ten Plagues, making it a great tool for teaching and entertainment during the Jewish holiday. This set is available today for $18, a 10% discount from its regular price of $20. 

And, don't forget the T-Shirt Boys Creeper inside Black Short Sleeve Gamer Top suitable for 9-10 years old kids. This shirt features a cool and trendy gaming design, perfect for your little gamer. This shirt is available for just $9 today, a 10% discount from its usual price of $10. 

These are my top picks for electronic entertainment devices and more! Grab them today to avail the 10% discount!

 

Query = "Which items do you recommend for my dental needs?"

 

Salesman: Absolutely, I have some fantastic recommendations for your dental needs that not only contribute to healthy teeth and gums but also make your daily oral hygiene routine more efficient. 

First, we have the Easyinsmile Dental Tofflemire Matrices Bands. These are made of stainless steel and are excellent orthodontic supplies. With a thickness of 0.04 mm, you get 144 pieces in one pack. They greatly assist in achieving optimal contour and tooth separation during dental procedures. They are a must-have for any individual who wants to maintain their dental braces effectively. 

Secondly, a pack of 315 Count Floss Threaders is available. This pack comes in green and contains nine packs in total. They are specifically designed for braces, bridges, and implants, making flossing in between and around your dental appliances a breeze. 

The third product is the RADIUS Toothbrush Source Floss Brush. This brush is BPA Free & ADA Accepted. It's designed to improve gum health & reduce gum issues. The medium-sized, starch-based brush is perfect for daily use, promoting overall dental health. 

Lastly, we have the Tenders Pre-Toothbrushes. These are ideal for individuals who need to gently clean their teeth or gums. You'll get 12 individually packaged pre-toothbrushes with a yellow trim in a pack. 

All these products are available online. If you decide to buy these products today, you'll receive a 10% discount on your total. 

The Easyinsmile Dental Tofflemire Matrices Bands are priced at $30, the 315 Count Floss Threaders at $15, RADIUS Toothbrush Source Floss Brush at $10, and the Tenders Pre-Toothbrushes at $8. With today's discount, you'll be able to get all these for a total of $56.70 instead of the regular price of $63. 

Remember, investing in your dental health today will save you from potential dental issues tomorrow.

 

Conclusion

It is clear from these experiments how valuable an LLM conversation can be but again it depends on how prompt template has been designed.

  • In the first use case, LLM doesn't have any role or motive - it is just give a few keywords to come up with something that it just makes up. Hence in the very first query it just throws a question - "which product is a mind game?".
  • In the second query, the LLM gets a few more inputs when the query becomes very specific by describing electronics under entertainment. Hence it goes on to describe each of the items.
  • However, the search result become interesting when the question is asked - what are the top 10 electronics entertainment devices. In this case, the vector engine does similarity search and finds the keywords "top" and "10" and returns the results. But LLM understands the context and ignores this list, instead it comes up with it's own top 10 list. This is very classical case of hallucination but at the same time it can seem very relevant because these items were never provided to LLM by vector engine(examine the list returned by vector engine).
  • The fourth query gives even more interesting results when vector engine just returns list of dental products but ignores the specific needs of the user! But LLM takes it one step forward and puts a disclaimer while listing and describing each of the products and specific situations when they can be used.
  • In the next use case, the role of a salesman is assigned to LLM. For the first query, while vector engine just returns the top matching similar and relevant items, LLM adds a new dimension by putting an elevator pitch for those products, adding neat descriptions, even assigning a price and then a discount - this is a clear case of hallucination but may seem relevant because vector engine never provided price information. 
  • LLM output is similar for phrase search as well, notice the similarity in sales pitch and hallucination in this case as well
  • For the query - what are the top 10 electronics entertainment devices, this becomes funny when vector engine returns products with keywords "top" and "10" and LLM takes one step further and adds elevator pitch for them. The first item is even okay but second one is basketball shoes, third one is finger puppets and fourth one is boys short sleeve t-shirts - none of them having any resemblance to electronics! Now LLM is indeed acting as salesman!
  • The last query for recommending items for dental needs - the LLM acting as salesman now removes all disclaimers and ready to sell the list provided by vector engine. Again, it assigns prices and discounts on it's own and ends it's dialog with an action item - "Remember, investing in your dental health today will save you from potential dental issues tomorrow."

SAP HANA Cloud Artificial Intelligence

entry.title: 10+ ways to reshape your SAP landscape with SAP Business Technology Platform – Blog 7
entry.content:
Blog 7: The Role of Automation for Transformation Projects

In times of constant change, quickly emerging demands for digitalization and competitive markets, companies are looking for ways to further optimize their processes. Consequently, many organizations have turned to automation technologies, such as RPA tools, to automate mundane and repetitive tasks. The benefits of automation are quite obvious: Automated processes are faster, less prone to error and people can concentrate on more complex, higher value-added activities.

Especially for activities with high volumes the benefits can be huge. Let me illustrate this with an example: A few weeks ago, I talked to a company from the consumer products industry. While a lot of transactions with its suppliers run fully digital via B2B integration, they still receive roughly 4.000 documents per month such as invoices and purchase orders via email. Let us assume you need on average 2 minutes for processing one document, that is: Extracting and verifying the data, collecting approvals, creating it in the ERP system and so on. In total, this sums up to over 130 hours of manual work per month. Applying RPA tooling and AI for document understanding can drastically speed up the processing of these tasks, thereby freeing people from tedious copy & paste or data entry and export activities.

Why looking at automation only is not enough

To streamline their processes, many companies have also started looking into other technologies: Besides RPA, also workflow engines, integration middleware as well as tools for process mining and process analytics have risen. One big downside is that these technologies often are not well integrated and hence customers are struggling with setting up an aligned end-to-end approach.

With our Enterprise Automation offering we want to address this and provide a unified and interlinked approach. As described in the blog article by Angela Harvey, this concept is based on the combination of 3 products:

  • SAP Integration Suite: You cannot automate what you can’t connect to. Our suite provides unparalleled connectivity and integration for a variety of scenarios. Be it SAP / Non-SAP, Cloud / on-Premise applications, B2B, B2G, API-led or event-driven scenarios.
  • SAP Signavio: Before you optimize, you might need to understand where to start and uncover inefficiencies first. With SAP Signavio you can analyze, model and govern your business processes to drive operational change.
  • SAP Build: Drive automation of long-running processes with capabilities for app development, process automation and portal sites. Low-Code/No-Code and visual design tooling also empower citizen developers and business experts to contribute to the development process in an agile fashion.

It is important to note that Enterprise Automation is a flexible and modular concept. Hence, customers can start with whatever product they see fit. From a transformation perspective Enterprise Automation can provide significant benefits when modernizing your SAP ERP, so when moving from the classic SAP Business Suite to SAP S/4HANA. It can be applied at any stage, both before the migration as well as after the migration:

  • Before the move: Leverage Signavio’s “plug and gain” approach and LeanIX to analyze and clean up processes in advance and gain immediate benefits from applying automation (e.g. via pre-built content packages). Use the Integration Solution Advisory Methodology of the SAP Integration Suite to design and prepare a future-proof integration strategy.
  • After the move: Bring process excellence to the next level by combining process mining, integration and automation and enable a continuous improvement cycle. Enable a governed approach to accelerate and scale the building of process automations based on Low-Code/No-Code techniques.

Another advantage in terms of transformation is the versatility – similar to a Swiss Army Knife. Enterprise Automation allows process optimization across the enterprise and line of businesses: Be it sales, procurement, HR, finance, production or logistics. A comprehensive collection of use cases and end-to-end scenarios has been put together by Manuel Namyslo in his blog article: How to get started with Enterprise Automation.

The role of AI in Enterprise Automation

Let us take a closer look at the role of AI and how it fits into the picture of Enterprise Automation. When transforming business processes and modernizing enterprise applications, AI should be part of the agenda, due to the massive benefits it can provide. Within our Enterprise Automation offering, the AI capabilities are tightly embedded to make the consumption as easy, seamless and relevant as possible.

A few highlights of them include:

  • Use Document Information Extraction (DOX) within SAP Build Process Automation to grab data from documents like invoices, payment advices and purchase orders to automate their processing. We also plan to integrate the DOX premium edition to make the processing of arbitrary documents with varying structure and layout even simpler.
  • We plan to use AI to provide recommendations for workflows as proposals based on historic data. This will support and speed up the decision making for approvals and workflow items (see roadmap item).
  • Visual tools already cater towards ease-of-use and simplify the building of process automations by business experts. There are also plans to make the design process even more intuitive by leveraging Generative AI functions (see corresponding roadmap items). As illustrated in this preview video, users describe what they need or what they want to craft in natural language. This can be an entire process flow, but also single process steps such as a business rule. The system then automatically generates the respective building blocks. Apart from that the AI-based assistant will also help with the discovery of pre-built content by providing suitable proposals from the content catalog.

As you can see AI is a crucial factor in many ways. Not only for the automation of processes, but also to accelerate the design and development process in various aspects. In addition, Enterprise Automation can also help with infusing AI into the process layer, by providing the respective integration capabilities.

To conclude: Enterprise Automation should be considered as a strategic tool set in the light of any transformation initiative for ERP and enterprise application landscapes. Its modular style allows you to start small at any stage of your project: From simple workflow automation and high-level process modelling, up to a fully-fledged vehicle for continuous process excellence. While our offering is optimized for SAP applications and systems, we embrace openness and enable process excellence across heterogeneous IT landscapes.

Where to look next and where to start? I recommend checking out the blog article How to get started with Enterprise Automation to get further inspiration. In addition, Low-Code/No-Code tooling such as SAP Build is well suited for getting Hands-On experience. Therefore, feel free to reach out to your SAP account manager to experience the ease-of-use in a Hands-On workshop. Finally, start by looking into potential use cases and assess them with the help of SAP or partners on how to tackle them with Enterprise Automation.

Previous Blogs:

  • Blog 1: The Central Role of Clean Core and AI
  • Blog 2: The Role of BTP as Extension and Innovation Platform
  • Blog 3: How Clean Core can accelerate your SAP Business Transformation
  • Blog 4: Mastering the Data Dance: The Potential of Clean Core and AI
  • Blog 5: How hybrid Integration upholds the role of Clean Core
  • Blog 6: Clean Core Extensibility

entry.title: 1H 2024 the “Employee Experience” release
entry.content:
By now, you’re probably diving deep into the SAP SuccessFactors’ 1H 2024 release and you might have noticed that our attention is focused on none other than the employee. After all, we’re all an employee of one sort or another. We might be an individual contributor, a manager, a project lead, a department leader, an HR professional, or even a CEO. So, as we continue to invest in delivering the best user experience, we are happy to share what’s in store for every one of our customers’ employees, including you.  

Everyone has a story to tell and so does your organization

People are the most important element in an organization’s success. Understanding who your co-workers are, what your employees bring to the team, and easily connecting individuals to one another is important for every organization. That’s why I’m pleased to highlight the new People Profile experience. With the 1H 2024 release, you’ll experience the new profile “Spotlight”. It focuses on enabling employees to easily share their strengths and value throughout the organization. With a focus on progressive discovery, the profile Spotlight facilitates deeper exploration, supported by the new Profile Preview that’s present across the solution. The addition, the new Profile Preview enhances contextual understanding by providing essential information about each employee, fostering better connections and collaboration. With a layout and card design optimized for rapid engagement and comprehension, the new People Profile experience not only elevates the employee experience but also strengthens organizational cohesion and knowledge sharing. Best of all, the new Profile Preview and Spotlight are coming to our iOS and Android apps, too.

In addition, our new Org Chart makes it easy for employees to explore key aspects of their organization. Seamlessly connecting employees to the new Spotlight feature, the new Org Chart helps individuals to understand at-a-glance, everyone’s place within the organization. A clean and crisp visual experience makes navigating the organizational structure and hierarchy super intuitive. Plus, the lightning-fast UI means employees can delve deeper to explore more in less time.

AI provides every employee a competitive advantage

Joule is a game-changer when it comes to helping employees be as productive as possible. With a host of self-service capabilities for employees and managers, Joule empowers employees to effortlessly do more. The copilot’s clean and clear visual language makes it easy to focus on the task at hand. It’s conversational design, fuzzy matching for less-than-perfect spellers, and 1-tap suggestive answers, make everyday tasks as quick and seamless as possible. Moreover, Joule extends across all SAP solutions so the experience of using it is consistent and familiar. As we look ahead, by leveraging LLM and and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), questions like “Is emergency room service covered in the medical plan?” or “We are about to announce quarterly results, can I sell company stock?”, will be answered and include links to source documentation building confidence and trust with your employees.

With our new AI-assisted Goal creation experience, we’re helping employees and managers to craft well-defined, actionable, and measurable goals. Powered by generative AI, this new feature swiftly transforms ideas into comprehensive goals ensuring alignment with the organization's strategy. The benefit is a significant reduction in the time required to create meaningful goals. Plus, pre-prompting promotes ease of use and encourages adoption. The solution’s simple yet effective results make achieving goals more tangible, while motivating employees to strive for success. In addition, AI-assisted writing functionality is incorporated in the Goals experience to enable further employee-led refinement of goals.

Our new AI-assisted writing tool elevates communication. Whether you're grappling with finding the right words or seeking to enhance the tone of your communication, AI is your trusted companion. The comprehensive editing functionality offers suggestive approaches to getting your message just right. The solution even enables contextualized editing. For example, this includes prompts to "make it actionable" when giving feedback and other forms of purpose-built support tailored to specific tasks. Looking ahead, the text analyzer feature promotes inclusivity by guiding users toward more inclusive word choices.

With this release we’ve also enhanced the Applicant Workbench with the introduction of a skills-based intelligent recruiting experience that redefines talent acquisition. Recognizing that skills are the currency of a modern economy and the foundation of talent decisions, this platform offers insightful and expansive consideration of every candidate and their skills, enabling recruiters to make better informed decisions. The skills layout accelerates the time to review candidates by prioritizing skill matches and even adjacent skills. Furthermore, AI explanations frame the results, so recruiters understand the sourcing methodology. This enhances transparency and trust in the recruitment process.

A new benefits enrollment experience is here

With this release I’m excited to share the introduction of a new Benefits Enrollment experience. Embracing a consumer-style shopping approach, this solution delivers a familiar and intuitive experience and enables employees to navigate the benefits selection process with ease. With step-by-step guidance, employees can make informed choices with the help of embedded content that provides valuable insight into benefits options. A running expense total enables employees to manage their spend as they progress through the enrollment process, ensuring transparency and control over their benefits selections. With this new Benefits Enrollment experience, employees gain the tools and support to make decisions that align with their needs and preferences.

Engage in the flow of work with SAP SuccessFactors for Microsoft Teams

The updated app is a groundbreaking new experience for SAP SuccessFactors within the Microsoft Teams application, designed to seamlessly bring HR directly into the flow of work. Anchored by a new homepage, this experience serves as a central hub, making navigation effortless. With today's collaboration tools enabling employees to complete HR related tasks within the flow of work, employees have even more opportunities to self-serve. For example, they can give and receive feedback in the moment, and stay on top of timely activities such as spot award approvals and learning requirements. This not only enhances employee engagement but also helps ensure that HR tasks are seamlessly managed as part of employees' daily routines. The clean and simple design makes discovery of tasks and to-do’s quick and easy.

The 1H 2024 release: something for everyone

By placing the employee at the center, this release empowers individuals across all levels of the organization, recognizing that everyone has a story to tell. From the redesigned People Profile and Org Chart, which facilitate deeper connections and collaboration, to Joule and the AI-assisted writing tool, which streamline processes and enhance productivity, each innovation improves engagement and efficiency. Furthermore, the integration of SAP SuccessFactors with Microsoft Teams and the revamped Benefits Enrollment experience demonstrate a commitment to meeting employees where they are and simplifying how they accomplish HR related tasks. As we continue to invest in enhancing the employee experience, we are not only fostering a more connected and engaged workforce but also driving organizational success and growth.

entry.title: Expanding Proactive Solutions: Critical Content now Live in SAP for Me
entry.content:
What you already know:

  • What priority solutions is support currently working on that could prevent business impacting issues on your systems (Hot solutions).
  • What solutions, relevant for your systems are other customers viewing most today (Trending solutions).  

 

What is new?

  • Relevant Critical content recommended by our product experts are now directly available for your product within the ‘Get Support’ app in SAP for Me!

As soon as you choose your Product and Product Function when creating a case, you get:

  • Awareness of anything critical for your business
  • Any workarounds or solutions available
  • Ability to subscribe to the critical content to follow for the latest updates

This ensures reduction in effort and time for you to resolve any issues causing severe business impact and ongoing updates providing latest solutions directly to you.

 

Where will you be notified?

  • Navigate to the Services & Support dashboard > ‘Get Support’ app in SAP for Me.

 

  • Fill in the Customer, Description, System, along with the relevant Product & Product Function fields.
  • If a critical solution exists for your Product or Product Function, you will be prompted with a popup outlining the relevant Critical KBA or Note linked with an option to subscribe.
  • It will also appear at the top of the right-hand side list of Recommended Solutions.

 

 

 

What to expect next?

  • We will continue to refine further which customers receive this popup in SAP for Me
  • We will push the notification of critical issues to further locations for customers to consume e.g., Built-In Support within the Product

Please also check out the below blog for more ways to access Proactive Solutions in SAP for Me!

Unlocking Proactive Solutions: Preventative Content now Live in SAP for Me

entry.title: How Defense and Security Organizations can Easily Migrate to the Cloud with RISE with SAP
entry.content:
Figure 1: Example picture

 

1) Introduction

­­

In the recent years, cloud computing has been among the most important IT trends, and it will continue to do so within the next decade. The leading technology consulting firm, Gartner, published various insightful statistics about the technology and its importance that highlight the importance for both private enterprises and public organizations. For one thing, as the below graph shows, the market for public cloud services will grow to $1 trillion by 2026. This relates to a growth rate of more than 100% when compared to the year 2021 and even marks the highest growth rate of all existing IT markets.

 

Figure 2: Forecast for public cloud services growth by Gartner

 

This strong trend towards cloud computing is also reflected in a Gartner survey among 367 enterprises . As you can see in the chart below, more than 50% of the survey participants in 2022 think that cloud technology is either indispensable or heavily impactful. When asked about the year 2027, even 90% believe that this will be the case.

Figure 3: Gartner cloud computing survey

 

Furthermore, 50% of surveyed organizations will use industry cloud platforms to accelerate their digital business initiatives in 2027, according to Gartner. In contrast, less than 5% of the participants gave this answer in 2022.

 

2) The Importance of Cloud Computing for the Defense and Security Industry

 

Cloud services are also of high importance for Defense and Security (D&S) organizations, like armed forces, aid organizations or emergency organizations. A recent study financed by the European Defense Agency shows that cloud computing can be applied to both the strategic level and the field level of military organizations. Furthermore, cloud technology can support European armed forces in achieving information superiority against its adversaries. The advantages of cloud technology apply to emergency organizations, like police forces, in a similar manner. Here cloud technology does not only improve the collaboration within and across police organizations, but also helps to complete criminal investigations faster. Fire departments can benefit from the technology as well. Examples for this include cost reductions, access to innovative IT services, a higher reliability of IT services or improved cybersecurity. Rescue service organizations, in turn, can profit from cloud computing through a better and faster handling of medical data. In this way, rescue chains in general and the planning of medical treatments can be improved significantly, which in the end can help to save people’s lives.

 

3) What is RISE with SAP?

 

Figure 4: Introductory video to RISE with SAP

 

RISE with SAP is a holistic package for customers, which want to transform their existing on-premises SAP systems into the cloud. RISE with SAP thereby not only includes SAP’s top-of-the-range software solution, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, but also various connected services, such as, cloud infrastructure and security as well as related migration and modernization programs. Businesses and organizations, which are not yet SAP customers can instead use GROW with SAP. GROW with SAP is an offer, that is specifically designed for new customers and small and midsized companies and organizations. But let us now take a closer look what specifically RISE with SAP offers for existing customers.

 

Figure 5: RISE with SAP overview graphic

 

The RISE package generally makes system transformations easier and allows customers to profit from all of the latest innovations from SAP. The key components of RISE – as the above graphic shows – are:

1) Cloud Solutions

S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition allows you to optimize processes in an unprecedented way. The Cloud ERP solution in this regard covers all common business functions of Defense and Security organizations like, for instance, procurement, human resource management or military planning and operations. Additionally, RISE with SAP includes packages, like the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) for app development, data management, automation and real-time analytics and SAP Signavio for process mining. The RISE solution beyond this also includes diverse innovative and helpful SAP Business Artificial Intelligence functions and features, that allow your organization to get better insights and save valuable time and money. What is more, the RISE program enables D&S organizations to use our holistic sustainability software, SAP Sustainability Solutions. These solutions not only allow organizations to monitor and manage sustainability and environmental issues, but also to ensure the safety of their employees at their workplaces.

 

2) Cloud Infrastructure and Security

RISE with SAP is built on the foundation of state-of-the-art IT infrastructure and security. In this regard, our customers can benefit from a very modern cloud infrastructure, that helps to ensure the highest possible system performance and availability of services around the clock. Furthermore, D&S organizations can profit from simple and effective service level agreements (SLAs), that guarantee a 99.7% availability as well as regular maintenance of our SAP cloud solutions. Moreover, our RISE with SAP offering is based on the highest standards for security and data protection. This not only entails regular security updates, but also the ability of permanently monitoring the system with regards to performance, compliance and potential threats.

 

3) Migration and Modernization

Our RISE with SAP cloud package aims to make the migration from on-premises systems to modern cloud systems as simple as possible. SAP for this created an easy, guided implementation process, that is based on the SAP Activate methodology. This methodology allows our customers to:

  • Gain an in-depth understanding of the extensive capabilities of cloud ERP.
  • Receive expert guidance to strategically plan and prepare for a smooth migration.
  • Discover new avenues to craft detailed implementation plans across multiple workstreams.
  • Seamlessly progress through all six implementation stages with clarity and precision.
  • Tap into a vast partner ecosystem for enhanced support and collaboration.
  • Access comprehensive assistance, that is available in more than 100 countries worldwide.

 

4) The Key Advantages of RISE with SAP

 

RISE with SAP unites all advantages of cloud computing technology with the well-known advantages of SAP software solutions. The combination of the two technologies thereby even enabled SAP to create its most advanced ERP products so far, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. The main advantages of RISE with SAP are:

High scalability and usage-based pricing

Our cloud solutions allow your D&S organization to easily scale your SAP systems, in a needs-based manner. This is not limited to a certain part of your organization, but can be applied across your entire global operations. The high scalability thereby not only facilitates your organization’s IT processes, but also pays off financially due to the “pay only what you need approach”.

 

Better collaboration

SAP S/4HANA Cloud allows for a better collaboration among your workforce. Your employees are enabled to work jointly on tasks, communicate directly and share information. This can be done for instance with the SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub, a versatile tool for process collaboration. Furthermore, our cloud ERP solutions also enable our clients to better collaborate with their stakeholders, such as suppliers.

 

Process automatization and access to diverse innovative functions and features

The RISE with SAP offering entails access to various innovative platforms, functions, and features as well as to a variety of useful partner solutions. Examples for this are the SAP Business Technology Platform or SAP Business Artificial Intelligence, two solutions, that were designed to complement each other perfectly. The BTP, on the one hand, is a platform, that bundles services like data management and analytics, application development, automation, and integration as well as artificial intelligence in one environment. The platform is thereby also helping to accelerate the transformation to the cloud significantly. SAP Business AI, on the other hand, is an umbrella term for all available AI solutions from SAP. Good examples for this are SAP Joule, a Generative Artificial Intelligence-based copilot within SAP applications. SAP Joule can answer diverse questions, guide the user through the application or even solve various tasks in an automated manner. Other examples for SAP Business AI include the automatization of processes, such as guided buying or automatically generated job descriptions.

 

5) Migration Options

 

D&S organizations, which are already using SAP solutions and want to migrate their systems to the cloud can choose among two principal migration options:

1) Migrate from SAP ERP

D&S organizations, that use SAP ERP and want to migrate to the state-of-the-art SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition can profit from a guided transformation process. This process allows the organizations to make use of diverse best practices for the migration of their systems and data throughout all phases of the transformation journey. Principal advantages of this concept are that customers are enabled to maintain system configurations just like their data sets easily in the new cloud environment.

 

2) Migrate from SAP S/4HANA

The migration from an existing on-premises SAP S/4HANA system to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition is even less complex. The transition to the cloud here works very frictionless, which means that – in most cases – customers can just transform their systems and data centers to the new S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition environment.

 

3) Alternative for new customers: GROW with SAP

As already mentioned above, SAP recommends new customers the tailored cloud transformation program GROW with SAP. GROW with SAP allows for a fast and predictable implementation of the SAP cloud systems and includes most of the advantages of the RISE offering. Unlike the RISE with SAP package, the GROW solution relies on a Public Cloud architecture in the form of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

6) Security Features of RISE with SAP

 

RISE with SAP is built on a comprehensive security architecture, that enables our customers not only to work safely, but also to protect their data regardless from where and in which local circumstance they work. The security architecture comprises enterprise-grade security features and standards, like:

  • Physical access control
  • User authentication and authorization functions
  • Advanced functions for the function and user-based separation of data
  • Data encryption
  • Automated back-ups and protection from data losses (data recovery)
  • Data encryption features
  • Full compliance with data protection guidelines like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

- Comprehensive protection of client data

- Auditing functions

- Integrated capabilities for deleting personal data

  • Sovereign Cloud solutions for organizations with higher security and data-protection requirements, including:

- Use of data centers, that are located in the resident country or region of the respective company or organization

- Data being solely stored and processed within the sovereign borders of the country or region

- Corresponding proof of national and international security certifications and attestations

- Adherence to high security standards throughout all steps

- Increased security requirements for employees

 

7) Cloud Solutions with Advanced Security Features by SAP NS2

 

For companies and organizations, which have even higher cybersecurity requirements, SAP is offering cloud solutions with advanced cyber security measures. SAP therefore established its own independent subsidiary called SAP National Security Services (SAP NS2). SAP NS2 is mainly focused on the US, Canadian and Australian market, where it, among other things, is responsible for the adherence of SAP products to diverse security and regulatory requirements. The focus of SAP NS2 thereby lies on ultra-secure cloud solutions for highly regulated industries like D&S organizations, but also for actors with such needs within other industries. This includes highest level of security standards, like the US Department of Defense Impact Level 4 (DoD IL4) requirements just like the US Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) certification. The company’s product portfolio includes:

  1. SAP Secure Cloud Services and Products
    • SAP NS2 offers a great range of SAP cloud products and solutions with enhanced security standards. The product portfolio includes ERP-solutions, like SAP S/4HANA, as well as diverse solutions for functional areas, like Supply Chain Management, Finance, Human Resource Management or Spend Management. In addition, NS2, with the SAP Business Technology Platform, also offers diverse automation, analytics, data management and Artificial Intelligence solutions.        
  2. Professional Services
    • SAP NS2 offers its customers a variety of Professional Services, that range from cloud transformation over advisory services to implementation services.                                                      
  3. Support
    • SAP NS2 permanently supports its customers with a highly specialized customer service team, which answers any kinds of questions or issue resolution.                                                                   
  4. Mission Solutions 
    • SAP NS2 offers a variety of additional services under its brand DataCTRL, that allow D&S customers to securely manage and catalog data across their organization. DataCTRL thereby enables D&S organizations to perform a better and faster data handling, which, for instance, can speed up the migration from on-premises to cloud systems.

 

Key Takeaways

 

All in all, this blog entry has shown that RISE with SAP brings significant benefits for Defense and Security organizations, that shouldn’t be ignored. This includes advantages, such as, process automatization just like better collaboration or access to the latest functions and features. What the blog has also shown is that cloud technology, like RISE with SAP, can make all types of D&S organizations more efficient and successful, and here even allows them to strengthen themselves within their core competencies. Although the security of cloud solutions is typically a rather controversial issue among IT responsibles, it has been shown in the blog that SAP’s cloud solutions are built on the foundation of a strong security architecture. This architecture includes various security functions and features like automated backups, encryption, or access control functions. For organizations with even higher cybersecurity requirements, SAP can refer its customers to its specialized subsidiary, SAP NS2. SAP NS2 offers ultra-secure cloud solutions with the highest possible security certifications for highly regulated industries, like Defense and Security. Beyond that, our customers can expect numerous further innovations for the future from SAP, which includes Generative AI functions just like the stepwise integration of SAP’s intelligent copilot, Joule, into SAP applications.  

 

Product Tour for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

 

If you are interested in learning more about RISE with SAP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and its advantages for the different operational processes in the following product tour:

Figure 6: Link to the RISE with SAP product tour

 

Sources

 

Accelerate Digital Transformation, Enable Compliance, and Mitigate Risk with Sovereign Cloud Capabilities from SAP. (2023, September). SAP.

Breaking the cloud barrier in aerospace and defense. (2022). Accenture.

‘Combat cloud’: EDA study shows benefits of cloud computing for EU militaries. (2024, January 24). European Defense Agency.

Digitalisation of Defence in NATO and the EU: Making European Defence Fit for the Digital Age. (2023, August 10). IISS.

Healthcare Cloud Computing: Meaning, Advantages, and Implementation Pitfalls. (2023, August 16). IEEE.

How fire departments can extinguish money, space, and data loss with the cloud. (2020, May 11). ZDNET.

Military Cloud Computing Market. (2023, September). MarketsandMarkets.

Why using the cloud is about more than just efficient storage. (2022, September 2). POLICE1.

entry.title: 4 Lessons from Moms in Risk-Resiliency for Supply Chain Professionals
entry.content:
This Sunday is Mother’s Day! It is a beautiful day to show our moms, grandmas, or nanas how much we care and appreciate all the things they do for us. They are our first real-time superheroes, setting an amazing example in every aspect of life. So, why not take a cue from moms and incorporate their best practices into our supply chain strategies? 

Let's get inspired and see how we can learn from our very first supply chain managers of all time: our moms!

 

#1 She is the dictionary definition of risk-resiliency.

When I was a kid, each time I tripped and scraped my knee, like a superhero, my mom would come rushing to my rescue with a napkin and band-aid in hand. Or whenever I mentioned I was hungry or thirsty, she'd pull out a magical purse filled with snacks and water. They are constantly one step ahead, knowing our needs and ready for any kind of shenanigans.

Just like how moms, supply chain professionals need to have their special tools in their toolbox to predict, anticipate, and act with agility toward any issues that may arise. If anyone knows how often the ship hits the fan, it's supply chain managers.

One of the most important tools in the supply chain managers’ toolbox is having full visibility to thrive instead of just surviving in the business world. Breaking down silos and sharing real-time information with each stakeholder in the supply chain operations enables businesses to make informed decisions with an agile reflex.

 

#2 She leverages Momtifical Analysis capabilities.

Let’s be honest, moms never seem to forget a single detail – this is a dad-approved statement by the way - and they are always ready to give us the guidance and support we need to make the optimal decision in seconds.

Much like moms’ ability to make quick decisions, supply chain professionals need the tools to do the same. Incorporating business AI into operations is like the supermom senses of real-time data and insights, enabling supply chain managers to make quick and resolute decisions and guiding businesses through the complexities.

By harnessing the power of data analytics and machine learning algorithms, organizations can pinpoint and address issues in real time, reduce wastage, and improve overall production quality. They prevent potential equipment malfunctions before they occur, schedule maintenance, and safeguard against costly breakdowns and production chokepoints, which enables them to increase efficiency and maximize profitability.

  

#3 She can effectively alternate sourcing strategies.

Shopping with mom is like embarking on a wild scavenger hunt through the aisles of multiple stores. She knows where to buy the freshest groceries, and always knows when to get them. Moms’ knowledge of suppliers - including the network amongst the local stores and other moms - is so extensive that she is always prepared and alternates sourcing strategies in case their supplier cannot provide what they need.

In today's digital age, an interconnected, transparent, and versatile network is a must for businesses to establish strong connections with their partners and suppliers along the supply chain. Connecting the partners, suppliers, and logistics data in a single centralized environment eliminates the need for individual integrations with each trading partner. This streamlined and centralized network improves risk management and enhances trust, therefore, enhancing customer satisfaction.

 

#4 She shapes a greener future.

Back in the day, my schoolbag and pockets were like a treasure trove of empty snack packs and wrappers, as my mom taught me to throw away my trash only in the bin.  Fast forward to adulthood, I still find myself hoarding trash in my bags, as her voice still rings in my head. The fact is moms are shaping the future by teaching generations to be eco-conscious by instilling habits like repurposing items and cutting down on waste.

Just as mothers are instrumental in making this change, supply chains, as great contributors to waste in the world, are also essential drivers of change and innovation in creating a more sustainable future for our planet. 

By implementing sustainable methodologies and tools, the supply chain can become a valuable asset in not only profitable growth but also positive environmental change. 

In a world where we are consistently looking for alternative ways to run supply chains more efficiently, why not draw inspiration from our very first supply chain managers we know: our mothers?
